mapper.select: WITH CAL AS ( SELECT CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AS DT UNION ALL SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 1, DT) FROM CAL WHERE DT < CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ) SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAL.DT, 23) AS workDate, DATEPART(WEEKDAY, CAL.DT) AS dayOfWeekNum, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_CODE, '') AS shiftCode, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_NAME, '') AS shiftName, s.WORK_ON_HHMM AS workOnHhmm, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM AS workOffHhmm, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '') AS workDayType FROM CAL LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 h ON h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON h.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND h.DEPT_CODE = dept.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON dept.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pm.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAL.DT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON pd.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND pd.SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE ORDER BY CAL.DT OPTION (MAXRECURSION 62)

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), WORK_DATE, 23) AS workDate, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, REQUEST_CATEGORY AS requestCategory, REQUEST_WORK_CODE AS requestWorkCode, START_TIME AS startTime, END_TIME AS endTime, STATUS AS status FROM HRTATTREQ01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND WORK_DATE BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ORDER BY WORK_DATE, REQUEST_ID

SELECT h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 d ON h.COMPANY = d.COMPANY AND h.DEPT_CODE = d.DEPT_CODE WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
